name: When JSON Is Not Enough: Semantic Reliability of Schema-Constrained LLM Ordering Agents

description: arXiv:2607.18261v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLM agents are increasingly used as transaction compilers: a user states an intent in natural language, and the model emits a structured object that an API can execute. JSON Schema and provider-level structured-output modes are useful because they remove a large class of parse failures, but they do not by themselves decide whether the object is a...
author: Yin Li
